reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content:
겨울에도 놓칠수 없는 개모차 꾸미기! 누가봐도 식빵카🦊❤️
새로 꾸민 뉴식빵카 끌고 쇼핑 🛒 new 가드에는 고리 다는곳이 있어 식빵이 키링도 달아줄수 있어 더 특별하고 가드길이가 길어지고 넓어졌다. 겨울에 딱인 포근한 플러피네스트 요거 짱임!

안감이 보드럽고 따뜻해서 추운겨울을 따뜻하게 보낼수 있을것 같당
식빵이가 앉은자리 만져보니 후끈후끈♨️ 따뜻해서 식빵이가 계속 식빵굽게 한다ㅋ
개모차에 넣고 쓰다가 실내에서는 방석으로 이용할수 있어 넘 좋다
주인이 들기엔 많이 힘들지만(?) 묵직한 식빵이도 담아준다ㅋ
겨울에도 애사레로 꾸민 빠방이에서 따뜻하게 보내야지☃️
reviews.content_en:
Winter stroller styling that you can't miss! Shokupan (my fluffy pup) is totally giving bread loaf vibes 🦊❤️
Took out the newly styled stroller for shopping 🛒 The new guard has a ring attachment point so I can add a keychain to Shokupan too - it's extra special! The guard is longer and wider now. The cozy Fluffy Nest is perfect for winter!

The lining is soft and warm, so I think we'll be able to stay toasty through the cold winter 😊
When I touch where Shokupan sits, it's nice and warm ♨️ so Shokupan just keeps lounging in loaf position lol
It's amazing because I can use it in the stroller and then as a cushion indoors
It's a bit heavy for the owner to carry (?) but it holds my chunky Shokupan just fine lol
Gotta keep my Shokupan cute and cozy in the stroller all winter long ☃️

reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content:
포곤포곤 속꽉찬 만두🥟 이대로 납치하라고 만든 애사래 플러피네스트!
폭닥폭닥 포근따땃하니 녹은 강아지들 그대로 들튀하시면 됩니다🏃
reviews.content_en:
Plump and perfectly packed like a dumpling 🥟 A fluffy nest designed for your pet to snuggle in!
Just pop your melted, sleepy pup inside and go! 🏃

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 색감도 너무 예쁘고 폭신폭신해서 그런가 안에 태워놓으면 잘자요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The colors are so pretty and it's so fluffy that my pup sleeps really well when I put them inside hehe

reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content:
뽀숑이 유모차 방석이랑 가드 원래도 애플사이다 꺼 쓰고 있었는데, 이번 시즌 꺼 진짜 미쳤어여! 1견1애플사이다 해씀 좋겠다 지짜루!!🍎💕🤎
⠀
일단 넘 이쁘고요 (컬러조합맛집이에요!)
세탁&관리 진짜 쉽고요, 이번 껀 손잡이가 있어서 뽀숑이 타고 있는 그대로
유모차에서 슝 꺼내서 밖에 둘 수 있고요, 복주머니처럼 되는 조임끈?같은 게 있어서
뽀숑이를 폭 감싸면서 더욱 아늑하게 만들어줘요.
그래서 그런가 사진 찍어야 하는데 자꾸 졸아요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
I was already using the previous Apple Cider stroller cushion and guard, but this season's version is seriously insane! 🍎💕🤎 I wish every dog had their own Apple Cider set!!

First of all, it's super pretty (the color combo is a masterpiece!)
It's really easy to wash and maintain, and this version has handles so I can just slip it right out of the stroller with Pposong still in it and leave it outside. There's also a drawstring like a little pouch that wraps around Pposong and makes it extra cozy.
Because of that, whenever I try to take a photo they keep dozing off lol

reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content:
산책을 따뜻하게 도와줄 플러피네스트와
더 넓어지고 디테일이 추가된 애플가드!

특히 플러피네스트는 진짜 보자미자 기절 ㅠㅠ
색조합도 예쁜데 무엇보다 희동이가 너무 좋아해요!
안감이 보들보들 푹신해서 집에서도
요 안에만 들어가 있으려고 해욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

거기다 내부 스트링이 달러있어 가방으로도 사용 가능!
이제 플러피네스트는 희동이 vs 누나 싸움이 될 것 같아요 🤣
reviews.content_en:
The Fluffy Nest to keep walks warm and
the updated Apple Guard with more space and added details!

Especially the Fluffy Nest - I literally gasped when I saw it ㅠㅠ
The color combo is so pretty, but most importantly, Huidong absolutely loves it!
The lining is so soft and cushy that at home they just want to stay inside it hahahaha

Plus it has internal strings so you can use it as a bag too!
Now the Fluffy Nest is going to be a fight between Huidong and their older sibling 🤣

reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content:
사과 모양 리뉴얼 되었어요. 앞 부분은 D 링이 있어서 키링과 똥 가방을 넣을 수 있음.
애플가드와 함께 귀엽고 폭신한 쿠션 함께 사용합니다. 턱을 올려놓을 수 있어서 정말 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en:
It's been redesigned in an apple shape. The front has a D-ring so you can attach a keychain and poop bags.
I use it together with the Apple Guard and a cute fluffy cushion. It's really nice that they can rest their chin on it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이전에 패드만 사놓고 가드를 못샀었는데 이번기회에 잘 구매했어요~^^
애플사이다 패드도 여름에 너무 시원하게 잘썼었는데
디자인이면 기능이며 너무 좋아요
특히 방석은 접어서 똑딱이 채워 걸어놓으면 수납이 용이해서 편리하더라구요
가드도 너무 좋네요~^^
reviews.content_en: I only bought the pad before and missed out on the guard, but I'm glad I got it this time~^^ The Apple Cider pad was so refreshing in summer too, and the design and function are both amazing. Especially the cushion - when you fold it and snap it closed to hang it, storage is super convenient! The guard is great too~^^

reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content:
올 겨울은 플러피 네스트 덕분에 따숩게 보낼수있겠어요🍎

가드랑 깔맞춘 블루 컬러에 자연광 조합 너무너무 예쁨!
특히 추워많이 타는 울집 댕댕이들한테 올 겨울 없어선 안될템
reviews.content_en:
Thanks to the Fluffy Nest, I'll be able to have a warm winter this year 🍎

The guard and matching blue color with natural light looks so pretty!
Especially for my pups who get cold easily, this is an essential item for winter

reviews.name: apple.cider.recipe
reviews.content: 애플사이다 가드&플러피네스트, 저 주머니는  이동할때 쓱 빼서 들고 다니면 좋더라구요. 너무 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: The Apple Cider Guard & Fluffy Nest - I love how I can just slip that little pouch out when traveling. It's really convenient!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 원래 하려던 조합 색상이 일부 품절이라 체크 라이너, 그린가드로 했는데 생각보다 예뻐 다행입니다. 아무리봐도 버디두기 개모차에 설치한 건 없어서 잘 맞을까 걱정했는데 라이너는 아주 잘맞고, 가드는 유모차 손잡이가 배시넷 가장자리를 지나가서 약간 억지로 맞는데 가드 자석 힘이 쎄서 잘 고정시켜줍니다. 사길 잘했어요*_*
reviews.content_en: Some of my original color combo was out of stock, so I went with the check liner and green guard instead, and surprisingly it turned out really pretty! I was worried since there aren't any BUDDY DOOGIE stroller setups to compare to, but the liner fits perfectly and the guard's magnets are strong enough to secure it well even though it fits a bit snugly around the stroller handle. Glad I made this purchase!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
완전 강추 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
진짜진짜 실제로 더 이쁘구
아이가 검정색이라 밝은색으로 했는데,, 너무 맘에 듭니다♥️
번창하세욥
reviews.content_en: Totally recommend 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 Seriously it's even prettier in person. My pup is black so I went with a bright color and I absolutely love it ♥️ Wishing you success!

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
너무 좋아요~~색감도 이쁘고
우리 강쥐랑도 좋아하눈거 같아요. 우리 멍뭉이랑도 잘어울리고 제만족인거 같긴하지만 좋어요
reviews.content_en: I love it so much~~ The colors are pretty and our pup seems to like it too. It goes well with our furry friend and I'm really satisfied with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
색상이 너무너무 상큼해요
유모차에도 찰떡이고 앞에 고리가 있어서
똥츄나 인형 거는데 아주 찰떡으로 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: The colors are so fresh and vibrant! It's perfect with the stroller and the ring in front is adorable for hanging poop bags or toys!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 쿠폰 주셔서 저렴하게 구매했어여 넘 이쁩니당 크흡 ㅜ
reviews.content_en: Got a coupon so purchased it affordably and it's so pretty ㅜ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
드디어!!!!!!! 가드를 구매했어여
얼마나 기다렸는지ㅠ세트로 하니까 너무 이뻐요!!
리뉴얼 되면서 키링 걸수있게 나왔더라구요
귀엽게 우리 토리 닮은거로 달아줘야징
reviews.content_en: Finally!!!!! I got the guard! I've been waiting forever ㅠ It looks so pretty as a set!! It was redesigned so you can attach a keychain now. Gotta hang it with something cute that looks like our Tori!

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content: 색상 고민 많이 했는데, 귀여워요ㅠ 하늘색 깜찍하고 체크 쿠션은 떼타도 잘 안 보이고 좋아용
reviews.content_en: I thought a lot about the color, but it's adorable ㅠ The sky blue is so cute and the check cushion doesn't show dirt even when removed - love it!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 깔끔하고 단모종이라 털이많이빠지는데 잘털리고 너무예뻐용
reviews.content_en: It's neat and my pup is short-haired so they shed a lot, but it sheds really well and it's so pretty!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
색상이 너무 예뻐서 주문했어요
에어버기 돔3 라지 딱입니다
reviews.content_en: I ordered it because the colors are so beautiful. It fits the Airbuggy Dome 3 Large perfectly!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 색도 딱 제가 원하던 색이고 부드러워서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's the exact color I wanted and it's soft, so I love it!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
막 한살이 되어서 작년 여름은 너무 애기라 얼렁뚱땅 보냈는데 올 여름에는 이곳 저곳 놀러다니면서 
유모차 자주 사용할거같아서 미리 준비 합니당 🙂
저도 마음에 들지만 저희집 말썽꾸러기도 마음에 드는 눈치네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup just turned one, so last summer was kind of a blur since they were so young. This summer we'll be going out more and using the stroller a lot, so I'm preparing ahead 🙂 I love it and looks like my little troublemaker at home loves it too hehe

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 맘에들어요 지난번에 필로우만 구매했었는데 잘 어울려서 만족스러워요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I like it! I only bought the pillow last time but it matches so well that I'm really satisfied hehe
